discover.title: Discovered devices
discover.description: The following Comet WiFi thermostats were found on your MQTT broker:

not_found.title: No devices found
not_found.description: Tip: Turn the thermostat dial to trigger an MQTT message, then try again.

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Read device info from MQTT topic: prefix/account_id/device_id/V/A0

error.invalid_device_id: Invalid device ID (only hex characters allowed)
error.invalid_account_id: Invalid account ID (only hex characters allowed)
error.no_devices_found: No devices found. Is the thermostat powered on and connected to the MQTT broker?

abort.all_devices_configured: All discovered devices are already configured
